parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM `service-desk-472314.coherent_voice_dataset.adsim_products_programming_items` ORDER BY ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC

parameters.query:
-- Insert ou update
INSERT INTO public.adsim_products_programming_items (
    PRODUCT_ID,
    PRODUCT_NAME,
    PROGRAMMING_ID,
    ITEMS_ID,
    ITEMS_REGISTER_DATE,
    ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
    ITEMS_START,
    ITEMS_END,
    ITEMS_DURATION_SECONDS,
    ITEMS_UNITARY_VALUE,
    ITEMS_NEGOTIATED_VALUE,
    ITEMS_TABLE_VALUE,
    ITEMS_TOTAL_VALUE,
    ITEMS_DISCOUNT,
    ITEMS_MARKETING_DISCOUNT,
    ITEMS_IS_LOCK_CHANGES,
    ITEMS_QUANTITY,
    ITEMS_QUANTITY_TOTAL,
    ITEMS_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE,
    ITEMS_IS_PRODUCTION_COST_TO_DEFINE,
    ITEMS_PRODUCTION_COST_VALUE
) VALUES (
    {{ $json["PRODUCT_ID"] }},
    '{{ ($json["PRODUCT_NAME"] || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json["PROGRAMMING_ID"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_ID"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_REGISTER_DATE"] !== null ? "'" + $json["ITEMS_REGISTER_DATE"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE"] !== null ? "'" + $json["ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_START"] !== null ? "'" + $json["ITEMS_START"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_END"] !== null ? "'" + $json["ITEMS_END"] + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_DURATION_SECONDS"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_UNITARY_VALUE"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_NEGOTIATED_VALUE"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_TABLE_VALUE"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_TOTAL_VALUE"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_DISCOUNT"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_MARKETING_DISCOUNT"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_IS_LOCK_CHANGES"] !== null ? $json["ITEMS_IS_LOCK_CHANGES"] : "FALSE" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_QUANTITY"] || 0 }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_QUANTITY_TOTAL"] || 0 }},
    '{{ ($json["ITEMS_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE"] || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json["ITEMS_IS_PRODUCTION_COST_TO_DEFINE"] !== null ? $json["ITEMS_IS_PRODUCTION_COST_TO_DEFINE"] : "FALSE" }},
    {{ $json["ITEMS_PRODUCTION_COST_VALUE"] || 0 }}
)
ON CONFLICT (ITEMS_ID) DO UPDATE SET
    PRODUCT_ID                     = EXCLUDED.PRODUCT_ID,
    PRODUCT_NAME                   = EXCLUDED.PRODUCT_NAME,
    PROGRAMMING_ID                 = EXCLUDED.PROGRAMMING_ID,
    ITEMS_REGISTER_DATE            = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_REGISTER_DATE,
    ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE         = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
    ITEMS_START                    = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_START,
    ITEMS_END                      = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_END,
    ITEMS_DURATION_SECONDS         = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_DURATION_SECONDS,
    ITEMS_UNITARY_VALUE            = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_UNITARY_VALUE,
    ITEMS_NEGOTIATED_VALUE         = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_NEGOTIATED_VALUE,
    ITEMS_TABLE_VALUE              = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_TABLE_VALUE,
    ITEMS_TOTAL_VALUE              = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_TOTAL_VALUE,
    ITEMS_DISCOUNT                 = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_DISCOUNT,
    ITEMS_MARKETING_DISCOUNT       = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_MARKETING_DISCOUNT,
    ITEMS_IS_LOCK_CHANGES          = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_IS_LOCK_CHANGES,
    ITEMS_QUANTITY                 = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_QUANTITY,
    ITEMS_QUANTITY_TOTAL           = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_QUANTITY_TOTAL,
    ITEMS_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE        = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE,
    ITEMS_IS_PRODUCTION_COST_TO_DEFINE = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_IS_PRODUCTION_COST_TO_DEFINE,
    ITEMS_PRODUCTION_COST_VALUE    = EXCLUDED.ITEMS_PRODUCTION_COST_VALUE;

-- Remover duplicados caso existam (opcional se ITEMS_ID for PK)
DELETE FROM public.adsim_products_programming_items a
USING public.adsim_products_programming_items b
WHERE a.ctid < b.ctid
  AND a.ITEMS_ID = b.ITEMS_ID;
